verses.geez:
ወተጋብኡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴሎ ፡ ወተከልዋ ፡ ህየ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ መርጡል ፡
                  ወአጽንዕዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And all the congregation of the children of Israel were assembled at Selo, and there they pitched the tabernacle of witness; and the land was subdued by them.
translations.kjv: And the whole congregation of the children of Israel assembled together at Shiloh, and set up the tabernacle of the congregation there. And the land was subdued before them.

verses.geez: ወተርፉ ፡ ደቂ[ቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡] እለ ፡ ኢተወርሱ ፡ ሰብዐቱ ፡ ነገድ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Israel remained, even those who had not received their inheritance, seven tribes.
translations.kjv: And there remained among the children of Israel seven tribes, which had not yet received their inheritance.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስከ ፡ ማኡዜኑ ፡ ታፀንሕዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትትዋረስዋ ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ወሀበክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said to the sons of Israel, How long will ye be slack to inherit the land, which the Lord our God has given you?
translations.kjv: And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, How long are ye slack to go to possess the land, which the LORD God of your fathers hath given you?

verses.geez:
አውፅኡ ፡ እምውስቴትክሙ ፡ ሠለስተ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ እምነ ፡ ነገድ ፡ ወይትነሥኡ ፡ ይዑድዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወይጽሐፍዋ ፡
                  በቅድሜየ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ዖድዋ ።

translations.lxx: Appoint of yourselves three men of each tribe, and let them rise up and go through the land, and let them describe it before me, as it will be proper to divide it.
translations.kjv: Give out from among you three men for each tribe: and I will send them, and they shall rise, and go through the land, and describe it according to the inheritance of them; and they shall come again to me.

verses.geez:
ወርእይዋ ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ወከፈሎሙ ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ክፍለ ፡ ወአቀመ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ደወሎ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜብ ፡
                  ወደቂቀ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ አቀሙ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መንገለ ፡ መስዕ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to him: and he divided to them seven portions, saying, Juda shall stand to them a border southward, and the sons of Joseph shall stand to them northward.
translations.kjv: And they shall divide it into seven parts: Judah shall abide in their coast on the south, and the house of Joseph shall abide in their coasts on the north.

verses.geez:
ወአንትሙሰ ፡ ክፍልዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ ክፍለ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ወኣበውእ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ርስተ ፡ ቅድመ
                  ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And do ye divide the land into seven parts, and bring the description hither to me, and I will give you a lot before the Lord our God.
translations.kjv: Ye shall therefore describe the land into seven parts, and bring the description hither to me, that I may cast lots for you here before the LORD our God.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ አልቦሙ ፡ ክፍለ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ክህነቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ክፍሎሙ ፤ ወጋድሰ ፡
                  ወሮቤል ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ ነገደ ፡ መናሴ ፡ ነሥኡ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ጽባሓዊ ፡ ዘወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: For the sons of Levi have no part among you; for the priesthood of the Lord is his portion; and Gad, and Ruben, and the half tribe of Manasse, have received their inheritance beyond Jordan eastward, which Moses the servant of the Lord gave to them.
translations.kjv: But the Levites have no part among you; for the priesthood of the LORD is their inheritance: and Gad, and Reuben, and half the tribe of Manasseh, have received their inheritance beyond Jordan on the east, which Moses the servant of the LORD gave them.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥኡ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ወአዘዞሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለእለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ይዑድዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ
                  ፡ ዑድዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወግብኡ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ከመ ፡ አብእ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ መክፈልተክሙ ፡ በሴሎ ።

translations.lxx: And the men rose up and went; and Joshua charged the men who went to explore the land, saying, Go and explore the land, and come to me, and I will bring you forth a lot here before the Lord in Selo.
translations.kjv: And the men arose, and went away: and Joshua charged them that went to describe the land, saying, Go and walk through the land, and describe it, and come again to me, that I may here cast lots for you before the LORD in Shiloh.

verses.geez:
ወሖሩ ፡ ወዖድዋ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ወርእይዋ ፡ ወጸሐፍዋ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መጽሐፍ ፡ በበ ፡ አህጉሪሃ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And they went, and explored the land: and they viewed it, and described it according to the cities, seven parts in a book, and brought the book to Joshua.
translations.kjv: And the men went and passed through the land, and described it by cities into seven parts in a book, and came again to Joshua to the host at Shiloh.

verses.geez: ወአብአ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በሴሎ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua cast the lot for them in Selo before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the LORD: and there Joshua divided the land unto the children of Israel according to their divisions.

verses.geez:
ወበጽሖ ፡ ክፍሉ ፡ ለብንያሚ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሁ ፡ ወረከቦሙ ፡ ደወለ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡
                  ወማእከለ ፡ ዮሴፍ ።

translations.lxx: And the lot of the tribe of Benjamin came forth first according to their families: and the borders of their lot came forth between the children of Juda and the children of Joseph.
translations.kjv: And the lot of the tribe of the children of Benjamin came up according to their families: and the coast of their lot came forth between the children of Judah and the children of Joseph.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ [ዘመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡] እምነ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወየዐርግ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አዜባ ፡ ለኢየሪኮ ፡
                  ወይመጽእ ፡ ዲበ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወየዐርግ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደብር ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡ መድብራይጥስ ፡ ዘቤቶን ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were northward: the borders shall go up from Jordan behind Jericho northward, and shall go up to the mountain westward, and the issue of it shall be Bæthon of Mabdara.
translations.kjv: And their border on the north side was from Jordan; and the border went up to the side of Jericho on the north side, and went up through the mountains westward; and the goings out thereof were at the wilderness of Bethaven.

verses.geez:
ወየኀልፍ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አድባረ ፡ ሉዛ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዘባነ ፡ ሉዛ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አዜባ ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  ቤቴል ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ደወለ ፡ አጣሮት ፡ ዘሆሬኅ ፡ እንተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አድባር ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ አዜባ ፡ ለቤቶሮን ፡
                  ታሕ[ታይ] ።

translations.lxx: And the borders will go forth thence to Luz, behind Luz, from the south of it; this is Bæthel: and the borders shall go down to Maatarob Orech, to the hill country, which is southward of Bæthoron the lower.
translations.kjv: And the border went over from thence toward Luz, to the side of Luz, which is Bethel, southward; and the border descended to Atarothadar, near the hill that lieth on the south side of the nether Bethhoron.

verses.geez:
ወየኀልፍ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ ዘይኔጽር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜቡ ፡ ለደብር ፡
                  ዘቅድመ ፡ ቤቶሮን ፡ ዘዲበ ፡ አዜብ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቀርየተ ፡ በዓል ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ቀርያትያርም ፡
                  ሀገረ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ።

translations.lxx: And the borders shall pass through and proceed to the part that looks toward the sea, on the south, from the mountain in front of Bæthoron southward, and its termination shall be at Cariath-Baal, this is Cariath-Jarin, a city of the children of Juda; this is the part toward the west.
translations.kjv: And the border was drawn thence, and compassed the corner of the sea southward, from the hill that lieth before Bethhoron southward; and the goings out thereof were at Kirjathbaal, which is Kirjathjearim, a city of the children of Judah: this was the west quarter.

verses.geez:
ወደወሎሙኒ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ አዜብ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቀርያተ ፡ በዓል ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ጋይን ፡ ዲበ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡
                  ማይ ፡ ዘነፍቶ ።

translations.lxx: And the south side on the part of Cariath-Baal; and the borders shall go across to Gasin, to the fountain of the water of Naphtho.
translations.kjv: And the south quarter was from the end of Kirjathjearim, and the border went out on the west, and went out to the well of waters of Nephtoah:

verses.geez:
ወይወርድ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ ዘቅድመ ፡ ናጴሳነም ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ገቦሃ ፡ [ለ]ኤመቀርፋይን ፡ ዘኀበ
                  ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ እምነ ፡ ናጲን ፡ ዲበ ፡ ዘባነ ፡ ኢየቡሴ ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ አዜብ ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ ሮጌል ።

translations.lxx: And the borders shall extend down on one side, this is in front of the forest of Sonnam, which is on the side of Emec Raphain northward, and it shall come down to Gæenna behind Jebusai southward: it shall come down to the fountain of Rogel.
translations.kjv: And the border came down to the end of the mountain that lieth before the valley of the son of Hinnom, and which is in the valley of the giants on the north, and descended to the valley of Hinnom, to the side of Jebusi on the south, and descended to Enrogel,

verses.geez:
ወየኀልፍ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ ቤታሳሚስ ፡ ወይበውእ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ከልዮት ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ዐቀበ ፡ ኤታሚን ፡ ወይወርድ ፡
                  ዲበ ፡ እብነ ፡ ቤዎን ፡ ዘደቂቀ ፡ ሮቤል ።

translations.lxx: And the borders shall go across to the fountain of Bæthsamys:
translations.kjv: And was drawn from the north, and went forth to Enshemesh, and went forth toward Geliloth, which is over against the going up of Adummim, and descended to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,

verses.geez:
ወየኀልፍ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ዘባነ ፡ ቤተራብ ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ዘባነ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ መስዕ
                  ።

translations.lxx: and shall proceed to Galiloth, which is in front by the going up of Æthamin; and they shall come down to the stone of Bæon of the sons of Ruben; and shall pass over behind Bætharaba northward, and shall go down to the borders behind the sea northward.
translations.kjv: And passed along toward the side over against Arabah northward, and went down unto Arabah:

verses.geez:
ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡ ለደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዘአሎን ፡ ዘዲበ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወገቦሁ ፡ ለዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘኀበ
                  ፡ አዜብ ፡ [ዝንቱ ፡ ደወለ ፡ አዜብ ፡]፡

translations.lxx: And the termination of the borders shall be at the creek of the salt sea northward to the side of Jordan southward: these are their southern borders.
translations.kjv: And the border passed along to the side of Bethhoglah northward: and the outgoings of the border were at the north bay of the salt sea at the south end of Jordan: this was the south coast.

verses.geez:
ወዮርዳንስ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ፡ እምገቦ ፡ ጽባሓዊ ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዘዐውዶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በበ ፡
                  ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘተወርሱ ።

translations.lxx: And Jordan shall be their boundary on the east: this is the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, these are their borders round about according to their families.
translations.kjv: And Jordan was the border of it on the east side. This was the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, by the coasts thereof round about, according to their families.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ኢየሪኮ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ ጌዎ ፡ ወአመቃስስ ።

translations.lxx: And the cities of the children of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho, and Bethegæo, and Amecasis,
translations.kjv: Now the cities of the tribe of the children of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho, and Bethhoglah, and the valley of Keziz,

verses.geez: ወቤተ ፡ ባራ ፡ ወሰ[ራ ፡ ወ]ቤሰና ።

translations.lxx: and Bæthabara, and Sara, and Besana,
translations.kjv: And Betharabah, and Zemaraim, and Bethel,

verses.geez: ወኤኢን ፡ ወፋራ ፡ ወኤፍራታ ።

translations.lxx: and Æein, and Phara, and Ephratha,
translations.kjv: And Avim, and Parah, and Ophrah,

verses.geez: ወቀራፋ ፡ ወቄፍራ ፡ ወሞኒ ፡ ወጎባሕ ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ ኣህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Carapha, and Cephira, and Moni, and Gabaa, twelve cities and their villages:
translations.kjv: And Chepharhaammonai, and Ophni, and Gaba; twelve cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ገባኦን ፡ ወራማ ።

translations.lxx: Gabaon, and Rama, and Beerotha;
translations.kjv: Gibeon, and Ramah, and Beeroth,

verses.geez: ወመሴማ ፡ ወቢሮን ፡ ወሞቄ ።

translations.lxx: and Massema, and Miron, and Amoke;
translations.kjv: And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,

verses.geez: ወቤራ ፡ ወቃፈን ፡ ወቃና ፡ ወሴሌቀን ፡ ወተር[ኤ]ላ ።

translations.lxx: and Phira, and Caphan, and Nacan, and Selecan, and Thareela,
translations.kjv: And Rekem, and Irpeel, and Taralah,

verses.geez:
ወኢየቡሴዎን ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወገባኦት ፡ ወሀገረ ፡ ያሪም ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወሠላስ ፡ አህጉር ፡
                  ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and Jebus (this is Jerusalem); and Gabaoth, Jarim, thirteen cities, and their villages; this is the inheritance of the sons of Benjamin according to their families.
translations.kjv: And Zelah, Eleph, and Jebusi, which is Jerusalem, Gibeath, and Kirjath; fourteen cities with their villages. This is the inheritance of the children of Benjamin according to their families.
